Saroj Prasad Sah Founder & President · sarO Foundation Nepal Est. 2018 A.D. · Ishworpur-6, Bayalbas, Sarlahi, Nepal

Our Story

Born from a Love for Mother Earth

sarO Foundation Nepal was founded in 2018 by Saroj Prasad Sah in Hetauda, Makwanpur — Nepal's green city. Driven by the conviction that every citizen bears responsibility for the environment they call home, Saroj built a grassroots movement from the ground up.

"My City, My Responsibility" — the philosophy that started a movement.

President's Aim: To serve people in the sectors of Entrepreneurship, Business, Science, Politics, Literature and Social Work.

From tree plantation drives and river clean-ups in Hetauda to child empowerment and puberty education programs in Sarlahi's Balwas and Isherpur Municipality — sarO Foundation turns compassion into action, uniting volunteers, youth, and communities across Nepal.

1,700+
Community Members

The Person Behind the Mission

Founder's Message

"

Every great movement starts with a single step and a single belief. Mine was simple: if we do not take responsibility for the city and the nature we live in, who will? sarO Foundation Nepal was born not from resources or power — but from love for this land, its rivers, its forests, and its people.

Hetauda is called Nepal's Green City. It is our duty — yours and mine — to keep it that way, and to inspire every Nepali to become a guardian of mother earth. That is the mission. That is the journey. And it starts now.

Saroj Prasad Sah
Founder & President, sarO Foundation Nepal
🌿 Ishworpur-6, Sarlahi · Est. 2018 A.D.

What We Stand For

Mission & Core Values

Our work spans conservation, education, youth empowerment, and community-driven environmental action across Makwanpur district and beyond.

🌱

Environmental Conservation

Protecting Nepal's biodiversity, forests, rivers and ecosystems through hands-on campaigns and community education programs.

♻️

Waste Management

Promoting zero-waste lifestyles and working with municipalities to build sustainable waste systems in Hetauda and surrounding areas.

🤝

Community Empowerment

Training local youth as environmental ambassadors who take pride in caring for their city and inspire those around them.

🌊

River & Water Protection

Advocating for clean rivers and safe water sources across Makwanpur — protecting the Rapti and Bakraha river systems from pollution.

🌳

Tree Plantation

Organising large-scale plantation drives every monsoon, partnering with schools, colleges and local governments to green the city.

📢

Awareness & Advocacy

Running campaigns, workshops and social media drives that inspire citizens of all ages to make environmentally conscious choices.

On the Ground

Key Programs

From schools to riverbanks, sarO Foundation's programs reach every corner of the community.

01

sarO Army vs Wild

A youth volunteer brigade that takes on nature's toughest challenges — cleaning riverbeds, clearing illegal dumpsites, and restoring green corridors around Hetauda.

02

Green Hetauda Campaign

A year-round initiative planting trees in roadsides, parks, schools and public areas with support from local municipalities across Makwanpur.

03

My City My Responsibility

A civic awareness program training youth leaders to be local environmental champions, running door-to-door campaigns and school sensitisation sessions.

04

Clean River Drive

Periodic clean-up missions along the Rapti River and surrounding waterways, including waste collection, bank restoration and anti-pollution advocacy.

05

Eco-Schools Initiative

Partnering with schools across Makwanpur to embed environmental education through practical workshops, garden projects and eco-clubs.

06

Volunteer Mobilisation

Engaging students, professionals and elders to participate in monthly environmental action events across Hetauda and beyond.

"Let's start the journey to save mother earth — our planet. From now."
— sarO Foundation Nepal, Hetauda · Est. 2018

The People Behind the Work

Our Team

Saroj Prasad Sah

Founder & President

Visionary behind sarO Foundation Nepal. Based in Ishworpur-6, Sarlahi, Saroj started this movement in 2018 driven by his love for mother earth and a belief that every citizen must take responsibility for their environment.

📍 Ishworpur-6, Bayalbas, Sarlahi

Aditya Patel

Manager — Sarlahi Operations

Mr. Aditya Patel leads sarO Foundation's operations in Sarlahi District, overseeing programs in Balwas and Isherpur Municipality — including child empowerment, puberty education, and environmental initiatives in these communities.

📍 Sarlahi — Balwas & Isherpur Municipality
